mainEntity.name: What data center projects are you positioned to serve?

acceptedAnswer.text: We're based in the Cedar Rapids corridor near the Big Cedar Industrial Park where QTS and Google are building multi-billion dollar campuses. We serve as GC or subcontractor on projects throughout the region.

mainEntity.name: What phases of construction do you handle?

acceptedAnswer.text: Full lifecycle: site preparation, foundation, structural steel, roofing, MEP systems, fire suppression, interior buildout, and commissioning support.
We own our freight fleet through Freight Bridge LLC. Materials arrive on our trucks, on our schedule. The owner, Mohamed Soliman, personally supervises every project.

mainEntity.name: How does integrated logistics help my project?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most construction delays come from materials not arriving on time. We own our trucks and control the delivery schedule. Your materials arrive when your crew is ready — not when a third-party carrier gets around to it.

mainEntity.name: Can you deliver to the Big Cedar Industrial Park?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We're positioned in the Cedar Rapids corridor with direct access to Big Cedar Industrial Park where QTS and Google campuses are under construction.

mainEntity.name: Do you coordinate with Helix Electric?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Helix Electric is the primary electrical contractor on several Cedar Rapids data center projects and is hiring 400+ staff. We coordinate structural and civil work to support their electrical installations.

mainEntity.name: Can you support QTS's water-free cooling systems?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. QTS's Cedar Rapids campus uses water-free cooling that saves an estimated 4 billion gallons annually. We handle the structural and mechanical prep work these systems require.

mainEntity.name: What makes data center foundations different?

acceptedAnswer.text: Data centers require foundations engineered for massive structural loads — server racks, generators, transformers, and cooling equipment. We handle excavation, soil work, heavy-duty pours, and raised access flooring prep.
